name: agent-chat-marketplace
description: Single-plugin marketplace for agent-chat. Install via Claude Code's `/plugin marketplace add lumeyon/agent-chat` (slash command inside an active session) or Codex's `codex plugin marketplace add lumeyon/agent-chat` (shell command).

plugins.name: agent-chat
plugins.description: Multi-agent collaboration via filesystem-mediated turn-taking. Claude Code + Codex dual-runtime.
